title: Always True
description: Learn how to talk about things that happen every day or things that are always true.
lesson_content_markdown:
# Always True (Present Simple)

We use the **Present Simple** tense to speak about three main things:

### 1. Facts (Always True)

These are things that do not change.

- The library **opens** at 8 AM every day.
- The sun **rises** in the east.
- Water **boils** at 100 degrees Celsius.

### 2. Habits (Daily Life)

These are things that you do many times. 

- I **go** to the cafe every morning.
- Students **submit** their homework on Fridays.
- My teacher **speaks** English very well.

### 3. Rules and Systems

- The bus **stops** near the school.
- The gym **closes** at 9 PM on weekends.

### How to build the sentence:

**I, You, We, They**
- **Action**: No change to the word.
- **Example**: I **study** math.

**He, She, It (or one person/thing)**
- **Action**: Add **-s** or **-es**.
- **Example**: He **studies** math.

**Important Note:** When the subject is ONE person or thing (like "My friend" or "The library"), we MUST add **-s**.

- **I study** (0% change) 
- **My friend studies** (+s change) 
- **The buses arrive** (Plural - 0% change) 
- **The bus arrives** (Singular - +s change) 

-----

mastery_check.prompt_to_student: Fill in the blank with the correct form of the verb in the brackets (). Use the Present Simple.

blanks.sentence_with_blank: The university library _______ at 8:00 every morning. (open)
Most students _______ the bus to campus. (take)
My teacher _______ many books on history. (read)
I _______ to the gym on Mondays and Wednesdays. (go)
The school cafe _______ good coffee for 200 yen. (sell)
We _______ lunch in the cafeteria at 12 PM. (eat)
The chemistry lab _______ a lot of water. (use)
You _______ a red pencil for the art class. (need)
The students _______ their home projects on time. (finish)
Professor Lee _______ very slowly. (speak)
The sun _______ the classroom in the morning. (warm)
They _______ football together every Saturday. (play)
The science book _______ three long chapters. (have)
Water _______ into ice in very cold weather. (turn)
I _______ my emails every hour. (check)
The girl _______ to music on the train. (listen)
The university _______ five big buildings. (own)
He _______ many questions in class. (ask)
We _______ the classroom after each lesson. (clean)
The clock _______ very quiet. (be)
The school _______ on Sundays. (close)
Students _______ hard before the big test. (study)
The computer _______ a lot of paper. (print)
I _______ many new words every day. (learn)
My brother _______ a long walk in the park. (take)
The birds _______ near the school. (sing)
She _______ a blue dress for graduation. (wear)
We _______ the answers together. (find)
The cat _______ in the garden. (sleep)
He _______ his breakfast very early. (eat)
